message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  ArrowColor Black
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
}

class "Brain" as Brain {
  [C]
  python_default, python2_default, python3_default
  pip_default, pip2_default, pip3_default
  get stored into the Brain's report objects'
  defaults = {}
  defaults.python
  defaults.python2
  defaults.python3
  defaults.pip
  defaults.pip2
  defaults.pip3
  attributes, respectively.
}

class "Pip" as Pip {
  [C]
  site_package_path
  python = []
  analyse()
  analyse_version()
  report()
}

class "Python" as Python {
  [C]
  result_shell_site_info
  result_shell_run_pip_as_module
  sys_path = []
  pip_module_version
  pip_module_site_package_path
  pips = []
  analyse()
}

class "Site" as Site {
  [C]
  path = path
  python = Set
  pips = Set
}

class "Base" as Base {
  [C]
  path = path
  paths_all = Set
  is_default = false
  is_default2 = false
  is_default3 = false
  result_shell_ls
  result_shell_version
  result_shell_file_size
  version
  size
  warnings = []
  report_obj = {}
  get exists()
  analyse()
  report()
}

note top of Brain
  Brain's attributes
  python_default, python2_default, python3_default
  pip_default, pip2_default, pip3_default
  get stored into the Brain's report objects'
  defaults = {}
  defaults.python
  defaults.python2
  defaults.python3
  defaults.pip
  defaults.pip2
  defaults.pip3
  attributes, respectively.
end note

Brain --> Pip : pips *
Brain --> Python : python *
Brain --> Site : sites *
Pip --> Base
Python --> Base

@enduml
